query:
INSERT INTO clinic_availability (clinicId, dayOfWeek, startTime, endTime, slotDurationMinutes, breakBetweenMinutes, maxConcurrentAppointments, active)
VALUES
  (1, 1, '09:00', '18:00', 60, 0, 1, true),
  (1, 2, '09:00', '18:00', 60, 0, 1, true),
  (1, 3, '09:00', '18:00', 60, 0, 1, true),
  (1, 4, '09:00', '18:00', 60, 0, 1, true),
  (1, 5, '09:00', '18:00', 60, 0, 1, true),
  (1, 6, '09:00', '13:00', 60, 0, 1, true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE startTime = VALUES(startTime);
